overview_zh:
1套起升变频机构
2套回转变频机构
1套变幅变频机构
1套平衡臂（含平衡配重）
1套40m起重臂
1套上下回转平台
1套内爬装置（不含液压油）
1套吊钩
1个驾驶室（含空调）
全套电气控制系统
全套电缆、钢丝绳和标准附件
全套标准技术文件和备件图册
overview_en:
01 set of hoisting mechanism with inverter
02 sets of slewing mechanism with inverter
01 set of luffing mechanism with inverter
01 set of balance boom with ballast
01 set of 40m jib
01 set of slewing bracket
01 set of internal climbing system, hydraulic oil excluded
01 set of hook
01 unit of cabin with air conditioner
Complete electric control system
Complete electric cable, wire rope and standard accessories
Complete technical documents and parts catalog
